index.title: Team management
index.importHint: Imports the top N teams from another league into this league. Teams whose club is already registered are skipped.
index.importResult: {{ imported }} team(s) imported, {{ skipped }} skipped (already present)

edit.title: Team management
edit.name: Name
edit.noAdditionalLeagues: no other leagues in the same group
edit.clubHint: For syndicates, select the main club here.
edit.syndicateClubsHint: Only tick the partner clubs here – the main club selected above is included in the syndicate automatically.
edit.noSyndicateClubs: no teams added, this is always wrong.
edit.contactPersonHint: a full name should go here: Max Mustermann
edit.teamEmailHint1: a team-specific address should go here.
edit.teamEmailHint2: please do not use a global club address, but record the person who is really on the road with the team
edit.logoSaveFirst: Team logos can only be uploaded after saving
edit.noLogo: no logo set (club logo is used)
edit.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG · will be resized to 100×100 pixels
edit.errName: A team name must be set
edit.errShortName: A short team name must be set
edit.errSyndicateCount: A syndicate must consist of two teams.
edit.errSyndicateMainClub: The main club must also be a syndicate club
edit.errEmail: A valid contact email must be set
edit.errContactPerson: A contact person must be named
edit.deleteHint: The team can only be deleted while no players/licenses and no games or results are assigned to it.
edit.deleteDialogContent: Do you really want to permanently delete the team "{{ name }}"?

notifications.noAccess: This area is not available to you.
notifications.logoTypeInvalid: Only PNG, JPG or WebP allowed.
